body.title: CLOSED: Epic: Fix ALL non-REFUTED Pass-2 audit findings
body.result: All pass-2 findings triaged and fixed by Opus in deep triage session
body.description:
Policy: every non-REFUTED finding across Pass 1 + Pass 2 becomes a ticket and gets fixed. No 5-10 cap. No filter-down step. Corrected 7+ times. See `project_three_pass_audit_shape.md`.

**Current state (2026-04-21):**
- 160 proposed tickets extracted from `lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass2_output/area_*.md`
- 6 already filed+mostly-done (T-cc-admin-consolidation, T-cc-env-split-startup-check, T-cc-hook-autonomics, T-context-load-rule-hash, T-engram-trigger-cell-name-mismatch, T-skill-model-audit-haiku)
- **~154 remaining to file**

**Three-tier routing (Akien 2026-04-21):**
1. **Igor-tier** — Igor fixes what he can. Worker field on each child ticket = `igor` when the finding is within his reach (dispatchable by `worker_foreman`).
2. **Claude-tier** — CC fixes what Igor can't. Worker = `claude` for findings that need judgment Igor doesn't have (cross-cutting refactors, CC-infra changes, HIGH-inertia calls).
3. **Akien-Claude-tier** — Akien + Claude talk through findings that need design. Companion tracker: T-audit-design-thread-pass2. Routing signal: child ticket has tag `needs-design` → surfaces in the design thread before sprinting.

**Child-ticket convention:**
- Each non-REFUTED Pass-2 proposal → one child ticket filed via `/decided` (so `/review` runs filing-time checks, including the new no-sqlite DISCARD filter).
- Child ticket body includes `epic: T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings` line so rollup can find them.
- Filing batched per area (area_1 through area_8). One `/decided` call per area; `/sprint-batch tag:<area>` when ready to ship.
- Worker assignment at filing time (igor / claude / needs-design).

**Scope boundary:**
- In: every non-REFUTED proposal in `pass2_output/area_*.md` gets filed + shipped (or explicitly DISCARDED with rationale at filing time).
- Out: Pass 3. Pass 3 runs only after this epic closes. Pass 3 does not decide anything — it's (a) conditional re-review + (b) brief-and-compelling human docs.
- Out: new findings from post-Pass-2 audits. Those get their own epic.

**Design rules:** no persistence (this is a tracking ticket — no new tables, no new state); test-plan-or-why-not — no tests (tracking ticket, not code); docs-in-code n/a (no load-bearing code).

**Test plan:** no new tests. Verification = rollup query on epic closure: `SELECT count(*) FROM tickets WHERE description LIKE '%epic: T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings%' AND status <> 'done'` should reach 0 before this ticket closes.

**Status tracker (manual until palace automation lands):** append progress to description as areas complete, e.g. 'area_1 filed 2026-04-21a: N tickets; area_1 shipped 2026-04-22a: N-k shipped, k blocked on design (see T-audit-design-thread-pass2).'
